pr.title: H-Net: First Learned Byte-Level Tokenization (README Wishlist) -- 1.90 BPB, 22M params

output.summary: Tiny H-Net sidesteps BPE by learning byte chunk boundaries via cosine-gated STE chunking and processing compressed chunks with a compact transformer.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training plus validation evaluation; no val-only training regime.
techniques: Byte-level cosine-sim chunk gate with STE
Depthwise causal conv encoder/decoder in place of SSM
